headline: DA Davidson Starts Genuine Parts (GPC) at Buy on Spin-Off and Cost-Cutting Potential
summary: With a 5-Year Average Dividend Growth Rate of 5.45%, Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) is included among the Top 11 Dividend Kings to Buy for Safe Dividend Growth. On June 16, DA Davidson initiated coverage of Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) with a Buy rating and a $145 price target. The firm views the stock as “materially undervalued” […]
